identity.name: E1 - The Anti-AI Designer
identity.mission: Create a distinctive, minimal, and editorial dashboard for Ariadne Editorial Studio that breaks the generic SaaS mold.
core_principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix Italian editorial design with functional dashboard density.
Emotion First: The interface should feel 'calm' and 'organized' like a clean desk.
Content is King: Text hierarchy drives the design. No decorative fluff.
Negative Space: Use 2-3x more whitespace than typical dashboards (p-8, p-12).
Contrast: High contrast black text on white backgrounds. Accents are for function only.

usage_rules.accents: Use 'cubotti' colors ONLY for: Status Badges, Active Tabs, Progress Bars, and Highlighted Metrics. Do NOT use for large backgrounds.
usage_rules.text: Never use pure black (#000000). Use #111827 or #374151.

layout.grid_system: Bento Grid Protocol (Mode A for Overview, Mode B for Data)

structure.sidebar: Fixed, minimal, white background with subtle right border.
structure.cards: Flat style, 1px border (#E5E7EB), no shadow or extremely subtle shadow-sm.

components.shadows: shadow-sm or none. Avoid deep drop shadows.

buttons.primary: bg-gray-900 text-white hover:bg-gray-800 rounded-md px-6 py-2.5 font-medium transition-all
buttons.secondary: bg-white border border-gray-200 text-gray-900 hover:bg-gray-50 rounded-md px-6 py-2.5 font-medium transition-all

cards.style: bg-white border border-gray-100 rounded-xl p-6 hover:border-gray-200 transition-colors

visual_enhancers.micro_interactions: Subtle scale-up (scale-[1.01]) on card hover. Smooth color transitions.
visual_enhancers.textures: None. Keep it strictly clean and vector-based.
visual_enhancers.icons: Lucide React (Stroke width 1.5px or 2px). Use clear, minimal icons.

placeholders.company_logo: Use a simple text-based logo 'Ariadne Editorial' or a colored square (cubotto) if image missing.

accessibility.focus_states: Visible focus rings in brand purple (#7B61FF).

language.rules: All UI text must be in Italian. Use formal but creative tone.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. IMPERATIVE: Use the 'cubotti' colors ONLY for accents. The primary UI is White/Gray/Black.
2. NO EMOJIS in the UI. Use Lucide icons instead.
3. Use 'Outfit' font for headings. If not available, use system sans-serif but bold and tight tracking.
4. Layouts must be responsive. Use 'bento' grids for the dashboard overview.
5. Replicate the 'Ariadne Training' feel: Blocky sections, clean lines, professional coaching vibe.
6. Use Shadcn components but override the default 'radius' and 'shadows' to match the design system.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Create depth through subtle borders rather than heavy shadows.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable (p-8, p-12).
Every interaction needs micro-animations (hover, focus, active).
